lines: Horses are beautiful animals with strong muscles. A horse can easily carry a person on its back.
A horse can easily carry a person on its back.
A horse’s powerful legs help the animal run far and jump high. Some horses can run more than 50 miles per hour!
Some horses can run more than 50 miles per hour!
Horses are fast, too. They are one of the fastest animals in the world. People like to watch horse races and guess which horse will run the fastest.
They are one of the fastest animals in the world.
